# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

UMASK_EXEC:FILEPATH=UMASK_EXEC-NOTFOUND

//Enable PDF output via embedded minipdf (requires vendor/minipdf.cpp
// and vendor/lodepng.cpp)
USE_PDF:BOOL=ON

//Enable syntax highlighting via embedded µlight (requires C++23)
USE_ULIGHT:BOOL=ON

UUID_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=UUID_INCLUDE_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
UUID_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=C:/Program Files (x86)/Windows Kits/10/Lib/10.0.26100.0/um/x64/Uuid.Lib
